response.overview: Bound by family feuds yet united by love and the desire to save the world, the two break through the deadlock of a turbulent age, and together forge an immortal legend. Set in a time of turmoil, the ambitious vassal king Yuwen Liang Shi grapples with a deep-seated family vendetta, while Murong Jun, the Grand Princess, upholds the honor of the imperial dynasty. What begins as a strategic game between an invader and a master tactician escalates into an intense battle of intellects, pulling them into a perilous romance.
response.title: 归良辰
